classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是'PIN'与'FUNCTION'组成的动力线针脚表，明确给出1至4号针脚对应'MOTOR U'、'MOTOR V'、'MOTOR W'、'MOTOR PE'及线色'YELLOW'、'RED'、'BLACK'、'YELLOW/GREEN'，属于电机动力接口的针脚与接线功能定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框是'Connector Detail Feedback Wire'区域内的三列表格，列出'PIN'、'FUNCTION'、'COLOR'，并给出1至6号针脚对应'VDD'、'GND'、'MA_P+'、'MA_N-'、'SLO_P+'、'SLO_N-'及线色，属于反馈线连接器针脚与信号定义。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标区域是制动参数数据表，包含 'Mo 0.32Nm'、'Pw 5.9W'、'Voltage Uoc 24'、'Max speed 5000' 等电机/制动性能参数，明显属于性能数据而非结构尺寸或连接器针脚图；在现有类别中最接近 'Torque-Speed Curve'。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区仅显示两针连接器的外形示意、'Housing:H66L6-02P' 与 'Terminal:T66L5-A' 型号文字，以及针位编号 '2'、'1'；没有出现针脚功能、线色或接线定义，因此应归入机械结构/外形类而非针脚定义类。

terminology_notes: ocr_001 的 P 与 ocr_003 在同一位置高度重叠，属于数字 2 内部笔画误识别碎片，未作为独立标注保留。

dimension_records.reason: 该文字位于连接器端面左侧圆角腔位内，为独立腔位或端子编号标识，不是尺寸值。
该文字位于连接器端面右侧圆角腔位内，为独立腔位或端子编号标识，不是尺寸值。

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector face shows two labeled cavities/terminals: 2 on the left and 1 on the right.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No dimensional values are visible in this crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为4孔连接器外形示意，标有孔位编号'1'、'2'、'3'、'4'以及'Housing:H66L6-04P'和'Terminal:T66L6-A'，仅表达连接器结构、孔位和物料型号，未给出针脚功能、线色或接线关系，因此最接近机械结构尺寸类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域显示 'SC-06' 的 6 针连接器示意，针号 6 4 2 / 5 3 1 与右侧整图中的 'Connector Detail (Feedback Wire)' 一致，且完整源图给出了 1 VDD、2 GND、3 MA_P+、4 MA_N-、5 SLO_P+、6 SLO_N- 的对应关系，属于反馈连接器针脚定义图。

text_annotations.correction_note: Selected over overlapping competing OCR reading ocr_001, which appears to be a misread of the same top-left pin label.
Selected over overlapping competing OCR reading ocr_002, which appears to be a misread of the same top-middle pin label.
Selected as the bottom-right pin label; overlapping ocr_011 appears to include non-text connector geometry or duplicated reading.

dimension_records.reason: The retained OCR boxes correspond to six visible numeric pin labels around the connector symbol; overlapping and low-confidence boxes that read as 9, 7, 口口, 口, 11, 一口, or duplicated 1 are treated as misreads of pin labels or connector geometry.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框是电机'Tecnical Data'性能参数表，包含额定转矩0.32 N.m、最大转矩0.96 N.m、额定转速3000 rpm、电流和时间常数等运行性能数据；虽为表格而非曲线，但在给定类别中最接近扭矩转速性能信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示电机前端安装面、孔位、引线和连接器外形位置，并含有'2-∅3.5'、'∅45±0.2'、'40'、'15Max'、'L≥300'、'45°'等尺寸和公差标注；未给出针脚功能或接线关系，因此归入机械尺寸。

title.title_zh: 电机前端连接器与安装尺寸图
title.title_en: Motor Front Connector and Mounting Dimension Drawing

text_annotations.correction_note: Kept as connector marking; angled small text is visible but partly ambiguous.
Corrected OCR 03.5 to Φ3.5 based on diameter callout syntax.
Kept higher-confidence complete reading; overlapping ocr_006 is duplicate partial text.
Added missing diameter symbol from visible callout.

view_type_detected: front view with connector harness detail

terminology_notes: Φ is used for diameter callouts.

dimension_records.reason: Callout uses L dimension notation with leader lines to the cable/connector harness.
Text is an independent connector label near the upper harness.
Small angled text appears on the connector body and is best treated as a connector marking, not a dimension.
Leader points to mounting holes; OCR zero was corrected to diameter symbol.
Vertical dimension line at the right side marks a maximum value.
Angular dimension arc on front face indicates 45 degree orientation.
Right-side vertical dimension spans the square front mounting face height.
Leader points to circular feature on the front face and includes diameter tolerance.
Bottom horizontal dimension spans the square front mounting face width.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front square mounting face is 40 mm by 40 mm, with 2 holes of Φ3.5 and a 45° angular orientation callout.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Visible front circular locating feature is Φ45±0.2; other shaft/key details are not specified in this crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Harness/connector region includes L>300 cable length requirement and 15Max vertical clearance/height callout.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector markings SC-06 and SM-6P are visible; SM-6P is partially ambiguous but retained as a connector label.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No additional dimensions should be inferred beyond the OCR-supported visible callouts.

unresolved_items.reason: Likely OCR noise from angled structural/leader lines; not a reliable engineering label.
Overlapping duplicate partial reading of the complete 15Max callout from ocr_007.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是电机侧视外形及轴端结构尺寸图，包含轴径、轴长、螺纹深度、孔深、总长等尺寸标注，如 'M3螺纹深8'、'孔深10'、'20.5±0.2'、'126.6±1'，并有尺寸线、中心线和公差，属于机械结构尺寸信息。

title.title_zh: 电机外形与安装尺寸图
title.title_en: Motor Outline and Mounting Dimension Drawing

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected tolerance formatting from OCR text 3-0.014; overlapping lower-confidence ocr_001 discarded.
Corrected tolerance formatting from OCR text 12-0.43; overlapping duplicate fragments ocr_004 and ocr_005 discarded.
Corrected vertical dimension tolerance formatting from OCR text 3-0.014; overlapping fragment ocr_008 discarded.
Corrected OCR $ symbol to diameter symbol Φ and normalized unilateral tolerance; competing ocr_013 and fragment ocr_010 discarded.
Corrected OCR $ symbol to diameter symbol Φ and normalized unilateral tolerance.

terminology_notes: Φ is normalized from OCR diameter-symbol confusion where the drawing clearly indicates diameter callouts.
Unilateral tolerances are normalized as nominal value with upper/lower deviations.
translation_notes: Chinese notes 螺纹深 and 孔深 are translated as thread depth and hole depth.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Width 3 mm, upper deviation 0, lower deviation -0.014
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 宽度3 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.014
dimension_records.reason: Top-left detail view shows a 3 mm feature width with unilateral tolerance, associated with the shaft/key slot detail.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Length 12 mm, upper deviation 0, lower deviation -0.43
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 长度12 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.43
dimension_records.reason: Top-left detail view indicates a 12 mm longitudinal shaft feature with unilateral tolerance.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Height/depth 3 mm, upper deviation 0, lower deviation -0.014
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 高度或深度3 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.014
dimension_records.reason: Vertical dimension in the small detail view gives the second 3 mm controlled feature dimension.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: M3 threaded hole, thread depth 8 mm, hole depth 10 mm
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: M3螺纹孔，螺纹深8 mm，孔深10 mm
dimension_records.reason: Leader note points to the small shaft-end hole and combines thread depth with total hole depth.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Diameter 8 mm, upper deviation 0, lower deviation -0.013
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 直径8 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.013
dimension_records.reason: Vertical diameter callout beside the shaft end defines the reduced shaft diameter.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Diameter 30 mm, upper deviation 0, lower deviation -0.021
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 直径30 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.021
dimension_records.reason: Large vertical diameter callout at the left side defines the main cylindrical diameter.
Horizontal dimension beneath the shaft-end slot indicates the visible slot or flat length.
Horizontal dimension from shaft-end reference to shoulder defines the protruding shaft length.
Small horizontal dimension near the transition shoulder marks a short axial step distance.
Small horizontal dimension at the shoulder indicates a 5 mm axial step feature.
Bottom-left overall local dimension spans from the shaft front reference to the motor body shoulder.
Long bottom dimension spans the main motor body/envelope length visible in the crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪框在完整标注源图中对应左下角青色框内的性能曲线，图中有纵轴'T(N.m)'、横轴'n(rpm)'、转速刻度1000至5000、扭矩刻度0至1.12，并标出'Intermittent'和'Continous'两条工作区曲线及4310转速点，工程含义为电机扭矩随转速变化的连续和间歇运行曲线。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected OCR spelling from 'Continous' to 'Continuous' based on visible curve label and engineering context.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Units are explicitly shown as N.m and rpm where visible

terminology_notes: OCR fragments ocr_005, ocr_009, ocr_013 and ocr_023 were removed as overlapping duplicate/noise readings.
translation_notes: Intermittent translated as 间歇运行; Continuous translated as 连续运行.
